title: WATCH:  Harlem's Fashion Row teams up with Gap amplifying Black designers
fullText: Harlem's Fashion Row teams up with Gap amplifying Black designersFive Black designers are sharing their take on denim by curating designs that bridge gaps through creativity and inclusion, positioning denim front and center.February 25, 2026
summary: Five Black designers are sharing their take on denim by curating designs that bridge gaps through creativity and inclusion, positioning denim front and center.
